title: Drilling down further into Jira
excerpt:

posts.author: MK_Blackburn (Mollie Blackburn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think that software teams would appreciate this suggestion:

When integrating with JIRA it’s a one-way street, JIRA data comes down the pipeline and updates Monday. However, when you update in Monday, nothing happens in JIRA causing double the work if you’re trying to make Monday your primary PM tool.

The integration sorely needs the option to track and integrate the “Release” date feature, which lives under “Fixed Version” in JIRA. It tracks release and/or deploy dates and from a Software PM standpoint, it is SO needed in order to improve workflow for PMs.

I hope you take this suggestion seriously!

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MK_Blackburn ,

I’d recommend you post your suggestion under the Feature requests/feedback category so it will be heard.
